tagline: AI-Powered Agricultural Price Intelligence Platform for Tamil Nadu
description: Agri Intelligence is a smart agricultural web platform designed for farmers and commodity dealers in Tamil Nadu. It provides real-time vegetable and pulse price predictions, plant disease detection using AI, and a personalized AI assistant to help with farming and market decisions.

home.title: Home
home.description: The landing page that introduces Agri Intelligence. It shows an overview of all features available on the platform.

prediction.title: Price Prediction
prediction.description: Predicts commodity prices for the next 7 days using an XGBoost machine learning model trained on Tamil Nadu market data (April 2024 to 2025). Day 1 shows the real-time scraped market price. Days 2-7 show AI-predicted prices with realistic market fluctuation.
how_to_use: 2. Go to the Prediction page from the navigation bar.
3. Select a commodity category (Vegetables or Pulses).
4. Select the specific commodity (e.g., Tomato, Onion, Potato).
5. Click 'Predict' to see the 7-day price forecast.
6. A chart and table will appear showing predicted prices per kg and per quintal.
prediction.chart_explanation: The chart shows Day 1 as today's live scraped price (green bar), and Days 2-7 as AI-predicted prices. The price trend shown as rising or falling helps you plan when to sell or buy.

disease_detection.title: Disease Detection
disease_detection.description: Upload a photo of a plant leaf and get instant AI-powered disease identification. Uses MobileNet V2 model trained on plant disease datasets. If confidence is above 50%, Gemini AI generates a detailed disease awareness report.
how_to_use: 2. Go to the Disease Detection page from the navigation bar.
3. Click 'Upload Image' and select a clear photo of the affected plant leaf.
5. The result shows the disease name, confidence percentage, and an AI-generated report with Overview, Symptoms, Causes, and Treatment sections.
tips: Use a clear, well-lit photo of the leaf.
Make sure the diseased area is visible in the photo.
A confidence above 50% gives the most accurate result.

ai_assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.description: A personalized AI assistant that knows your profile (district, crops grown or commodities traded) and helps you with price decisions, farming problems, pest control, market strategy, and more.
how_to_use: 1. Login and complete your profile setup.
2. Click 'AI Assistant' in the navigation bar.
3. You will see a personalized greeting and quick question chips based on your role.
4. Type your question or click a suggestion chip.
5. The AI responds with context about your specific crops or commodities.

login.title: Login / Signup
login.description: User authentication page. New users can sign up, existing users can log in.
how_to_signup: 2. Enter your username, email, and password.
4. You will be guided to set up your profile (role, district, crops etc.).

how_price_prediction_works.training_data: Tamil Nadu commodity market data from April 2024 to 2025
how_price_prediction_works.day_1: Real-time price scraped live from vegetablemarketprice.com
how_price_prediction_works.days_2_to_7: ML model predictions using chained forecasting with realistic market variance
how_price_prediction_works.output: Price per kg and price per quintal (100 kg) for each day
how_price_prediction_works.variance: Each future day has a slightly wider price range to simulate real market conditions

how_disease_detection_works.confidence_threshold: 50% — below this, AI explanation is not generated

farmer.description: A user who grows crops on agricultural land.
farmer.ai_focus: Crop price trends, pest & disease advice, irrigation tips, seasonal recommendations, fertilizer guidance

dealer.description: A user who buys and sells agricultural commodities.
dealer.ai_focus: Commodity price trends, best buying/selling times, market strategy, demand forecasting

faqs.a: PANDAM VILAI (which means 'commodity price' in Tamil) is an AI-powered agricultural platform for Tamil Nadu that predicts vegetable and pulse prices, detects plant diseases from leaf photos, and provides a personalized AI assistant for farmers and dealers.

faqs.q: Do I need to login to use the features?
faqs.a: The Home page is public, but Price Prediction, Disease Detection, and the AI Assistant require you to login. You can sign up for free.

faqs.q: How accurate is the price prediction?
faqs.a: Day 1 shows the exact live market price scraped from a real website. Days 2-7 are AI predictions based on historical Tamil Nadu market data. Predictions are indicative and should be used as planning guidance.

faqs.q: What languages are supported in the chatbot?
faqs.a: The chatbot supports English, Tamil, Hindi, and Malayalam. You can select your preferred language in the chat window and also use voice input.

faqs.q: How do I report a problem or suggest a feature?
faqs.a: You can ask the floating assistant for help or contact the website administrators.

faqs.q: What should I do after signing up?
faqs.a: After signing up, you will be asked to select your role (Farmer or Dealer) and fill in your profile details. This is mandatory and helps the AI personalize your experience.

faqs.q: Can I change my profile after setup?
faqs.a: Profile editing will be available in a future update. For now, your profile is set during the initial onboarding.

faqs.q: Why is disease detection showing low confidence?
faqs.a: Make sure to upload a clear, well-lit photo of the leaf. Blurry or dark images reduce accuracy. Confidence below 50% means the model is unsure, so try a better quality image.

navigation_guide.account_menu: Click the profile icon (top right) to login, logout, or see your username.
navigation_guide.floating_chatbot: A small chat bubble is visible at the bottom-right of every page. Click it to get help anytime.
